nasb.text: Therefore his calamity will come suddenly; Instantly he will be broken and there will be no healing.

esv.text: therefore calamity will come upon him suddenly; in a moment he will be broken beyond healing.

cnv.text: 因此，災難必忽然臨到， 他必突然毀滅，無法挽救。

ccb.text: 因此，灾难必突然临到， 他们顷刻之间遭到毁灭， 无可挽救。

csbs.text: 因此他的灾难将突然临到， 他顷刻之间将被摧毁，无法挽回。
